query: motion blur action racing speed dynamic movement
message: sub-element: motion blur in action/racing; intentional blur through camera movement and speed, artistic degradation of clarity; anti-aesthetics focus

response.objective_caption: A silver Pontiac Grand Prix sedan is driving on a paved road from left to right. The car features black racing decals, including the text '226 CP' and a checkered flag design on the rear door, as well as 'GRAND PRIX' text along the lower side skirt. A driver wearing a yellow shirt is visible inside the vehicle. The background consists of dry, grassy hills under a clear sky.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A silver Pontiac Grand Prix sedan is driving on a paved road from left to right. The car features black racing decals, including the text '226 CP' and a checkered flag design on the rear door, as well as 'GRAND PRIX' text along the lower side skirt. A driver wearing a yellow shirt is visible inside the vehicle. The background consists of dry, grassy hills under a clear sky, which are heavily blurred horizontally due to the motion of the camera panning with the vehicle, creating a strong sense of speed.
